tool.name: KAT Sect
tool.command:
## Sequence file must not be gzipped - link as-is with correct extension #if $sequence_file.ext in ('fasta', 'fa'): #set $seq_ext = '.fasta' #elif $sequence_file.ext in ('fastq', 'fastqsanger'): #set $seq_ext = '.fastq' #else: #set $seq_ext = '.fasta' #end if cp '$sequence_file' 'sequence${seq_ext}' &&
## Link k-mer input files (one or more FastA/FastQ, or a single jellyfish hash) #set $all_inputs = $input_files #for $i, $f in enumerate($all_inputs): @SET_EXT@ cp '$f' 'input${i}${ext}' && #end for
kat sect -o kat-sect -t "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" -x '$matrix_options.gc_bins' -y '$matrix_options.cvg_bins' $matrix_options.cvg_logscale -m '$kmer_options.mer_len' -H '$kmer_options.hash_size' $kmer_options.non_canonical #if str($kmer_options.five_prime_trim).strip(): --5ptrim '$kmer_options.five_prime_trim' #end if $output_options.no_count_stats $output_options.output_gc_stats $repeat_options.extract_nr $repeat_options.extract_r #if int(str($repeat_options.min_repeat)) != 2: --min_repeat '$repeat_options.min_repeat' #end if #if int(str($repeat_options.max_repeat)) != 0: --max_repeat '$repeat_options.max_repeat' #end if -v 'sequence${seq_ext}' #for $i, $f in enumerate($all_inputs): @SET_EXT@ 'input${i}${ext}' #end for || true ; ## The use of || true is a workaround for a crash caused by a C++ heap corruption issue within the KAT binary. ## There is currently no fix available. Despite the crash, the tool is still able to generate the required output and statistics files for downstream analysis.

param.name: sequence_file
param.label: Sequence file
param.help: Input sequence file to estimate coverage across. Must not be gzip-compressed

param.name: input_files
param.label: K-mer input files
param.help: One or more FASTA/FASTQ files (gzip accepted) or a single Jellyfish hash file used to determine k-mer coverage

param.label: GC bins
param.help: Number of bins for the GC data when creating the contamination matrix

param.label: Coverage bins
param.help: Number of bins for the coverage data when creating the contamination matrix

param.label: Coverage log scale
param.help: Compress coverage scores into log scale for determining coverage bins. Otherwise compresses by a factor of 0.1

param.label: Suppress per-k-mer count stats
param.help: Only output summary stats per sequence, not per-k-mer counts. Useful when running SECT on read files to avoid very large output

param.label: Output GC stats
param.help: Output GC counts for each k-mer as a FASTA-like counts file. This can be slow

param.label: Extract non-repetitive regions
param.help: Extract non-repetitive regions into a separate FASTA file

param.label: Extract repetitive regions
param.help: Extract repetitive regions into a separate FASTA file

param.label: Minimum repeat coverage
param.help: Minimum k-mer coverage required to consider a region repetitive. Only used when extracting repetitive regions

param.label: Maximum repeat coverage
param.help: Maximum k-mer coverage allowed for repetitive regions. Avoids low-complexity sequences. A value of 0 means no upper limit

has_text.text: >gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome___region:1_length:99_pos:1113:1212_cov:1-3
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome___region:1_length:81_pos:15498:15579_cov:3+
>gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome
gi|556503834|ref|NC_000913.3| Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655, complete genome

tool.help:
**KAT Sect - Sequence Coverage Estimation**
KAT (K-mer Analysis Toolkit) Sect estimates k-mer coverage levels across sequences in a provided sequence file.
-----
**What it does**
SECT produces a FASTA-style representation of the input sequence file with k-mer coverage counts mapped across each sequence. K-mer coverage is determined from one or more FASTA/FASTQ read files or a pre-computed Jellyfish hash. A summary table containing mean coverage and GC content per sequence is also produced.
-----
**Inputs**
- **Sequence file**: The reference sequences to estimate coverage across (FASTA or FASTQ, **must not be gzip-compressed**). - **K-mer input files**: One or more FASTA/FASTQ files (gzip accepted) or a single Jellyfish hash file used to count k-mers.
-----
**Outputs**
- **Per-sequence coverage counts** (``.cvg``): FASTA-like file with k-mer coverage counts mapped across each sequence. - **Per-sequence summary stats** (``.tsv``): Tab-separated table with mean coverage and GC content per sequence. Row order matches the input sequence file. - **GC counts** *(optional)*: FASTA-like file with GC counts per k-mer position. Enabled via *Output GC stats*. Can be slow to generate. - **Non-repetitive regions FASTA** *(optional)*: Sequences or regions with low k-mer coverage extracted to a separate FASTA file. - **Repetitive regions FASTA** *(optional)*: Sequences or regions with high k-mer coverage extracted to a separate FASTA file.
-----
**Notes**
- K-mers containing any Ns from the sequence file are excluded from analysis. - The sequence file **cannot** be gzip-compressed. - When running SECT against read files, consider enabling *Suppress per-k-mer count stats* to avoid very large output files. - The minimum and maximum repeat coverage thresholds only apply when repeat extraction is enabled.
